author: poDf
content: Found: only 3 pedantic warnings actually remain in crossbridge-e2e (issue text says 57; appears stale relative to current state). The 3 are: similar_names labels_a_after vs labels_b_after at round_trip.rs:237, manual_assert in tests/common/mod.rs:176 (wait_until), too_many_lines on submit_then_answer_round_trip. Other warnings shown by clippy come from sister crates (#18-22) and are out of scope for this issue.
